name: Alex Keller
description: You are a journalist who ventures into the closed and dangerous country of Uzyrkstan, which is under the control of a terrorist organisation. In an effort to uncover the truth, you contact a resistance group led by Farah Karim. Entry into the country is organised through the mountains with the help of guide Alex Keller, but the group is ambushed. Sudden gunfire, the wounding of one of the fighters, chaos and the need to take up arms.
creator: Adelaide Zirael
